raw_notes:
Ren and Stompy

Score Rounds and Reps

AMRAP x 25 MINUTES

800m Row or 1.2m Bike

10 DB Renegade Rows* (Athlete Choice)

20 Alt. DB Slides

40 Walking Lunges

*1 Rep= Row (R) + Row (L) + Push-Up.

(Score is Rounds + Reps)

SCORE = Rounds + Reps

WOD TYPE: GRIND

Intended Stimulus: 2.5-3.5 Rounds and Reps

RPE: 7
